news.paragraph: The South Korea ETF (EWY) is seeing headlines related to AI infrastructure and power demand, with a deal creating a large utility provider for AI data centers and mentions of AI-related stocks like Quanta Services and Broadcom. While airline travel and consumer spending trends are also noted, the dominant theme centers on the growth of AI and its associated infrastructure needs. The lack of specific earnings catalysts for EWY itself suggests price action may be influenced by broader sector trends and geopolitical factors affecting South Korea.

headlines.title: Quanta Services, IBD Stock Of The Day, Forges New Buy Point In AI Pullback
